name: AI Chat
description: Add AI chat capabilities with multi-vendor support (OpenAI, Anthropic, Gemini, Ollama). Includes a chat page and pop-up assistant.

packageFileDescriptions.src/lib/ai-hook.ts: useAIChat hook: useChat with fetchServerSentEvents connection to /api/chat.
packageFileDescriptions.src/routes/chat.tsx: Chat page route (/chat): Weather Chat UI with messages, input form, send/stop.
packageFileDescriptions.src/routes/api.chat.ts: POST handler for /api/chat: multi-provider AI (Anthropic, OpenAI, Gemini, Ollama) with getWeather tool and SSE streaming.
packageFileDescriptions.src/lib/weather-tools.ts: TanStack AI getWeather tool definition; server returns mock temperature, condition, humidity for a city.
packageFileDescriptions.src/routes/chat.css: Chat page styles: prose/markdown, scrollbar, message animations.
packageFileDescriptions.src/components/AIAssistant.tsx: Pop-up AI assistant component for header; toggleable chat panel with useAIChat.
